summary:
\(\boxed{\text{Vitamin A Deficiency}}\) The primary cause of rhodopsin deficiency leading to visual impairment such as night blindness stems from inadequate levels of vitamin A required for synthesizing essential retinal components like 11-cis-retinal. This directly impacts photoreceptor functionality within rods critical for vision under low-light conditions. 

Note that while your initial response was accurate, it could benefit slightly more clarity through direct mention of "night blindness" which aligns closely with typical presentations related to this condition. However, given constraints you requested only two-sentence summaries here we have adjusted accordingly maintaining core information intact but enhancing readability & relevance towards common presentation scenarios linked back explicitly where possible without overcomplicating further details beyond scope needed per instruction provided originally. 
Therefore final boxed solution remains same based upon original requirements specified i.e., VitaminADeficiency being most appropriate choice among options presented initially according context This directly impacts photoreceptor functionality within rods critical for vision under low-light conditions.
